ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Asia, Europe, Americas) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "washers" (
  "washer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each washer type */,
  "washer_type" TEXT /* Type of washer (e.g., metric, standard, specialty) */,
  "washer_description" TEXT /* Description of the washer type */,
  "unit_weight" REAL /* Weight of a single unit of the washer */,
  "unit_size" TEXT /* Size of a single unit of the washer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("washer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exporters" (
  "exporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exporter */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country that exports */,
  "washer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the washer type being exported */,
  "export_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the exporter to export washers */,
  "export_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the exporter from washer exports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exporter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exporters_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exporters_washer_id FOREIGN KEY ("washer_id") REFERENCES washers ("washer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export volume */,
  "exporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exporter */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the export occurred */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of washers exported */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of washer exports compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_volumes_exporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("exporter_id") REFERENCES exporters ("exporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country implementing the policy */,
  "washer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the washer type affected */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trade policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trade policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_policies_washer_id FOREIGN KEY ("washer_id") REFERENCES washers ("washer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country affected */,
  "washer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the washer type affected */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the market trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_washer_id FOREIGN KEY ("washer_id") REFERENCES washers ("washer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "data" TEXT /* Imported data in JSON format */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
